metadata.name: runCycle
metadata.description: Fire the full cascade once across every fireable cel.

metadata.name: hydrate
metadata.description: Inflate segments + manifests + fn maps into state.cels; lock-aware.

metadata.name: dehydrate
metadata.description: Serialize non-kernel cels and manifests to JSON-shaped 甲骨 + 冊 records.

metadata.name: flush
metadata.description: Tear down a segment and its dependents; fires _dispose, removes cels, precomputes.
